Unofficial Translation by the Insurance Regulator of Cambodia

c. Email;
d. Letter.

**Article 21 ..**

During the complaint process, the Department of Insurance and Pension shall prepare summoning letters to all disputing parties for information inquiry before conciliation by attaching with the complaint application form and deliver to and are signed certify the receipt by the parties.

The information inquiry shall be done on each disputing party separately. In every information inquiry, the Department of Insurance and Pension shall document the meeting with acknowledged signature by the responsible officer of the Department of Insurance and Pension and the party being inquired.

**Article 22 ..**

Every information inquiry and conciliation session in the complaint process shall be held at the Ministry of Economy and Finance.

**Article 23 ..**

If the applicant or representative of the applicant does not participate in information inquiry or conciliation sessions as set by the Department of Insurance and Pension twice consecutively without valid reason, the complaint shall be deemed null and void.

**Article 24 ..**

Applicant may suspend or withdraw the complaint by fill in form requesting suspension or withdrawal of insurance dispute complaint in a format set by the Department of Insurance and Pension.

**Article 25 ..**

The procedure for insurance dispute complaint can be suspended or delayed pursuant to the request of respondent unless respondent provide valid reason and is approved by the Department of Insurance and Pension.

**Article 26 ..**

Disputing parties have the following rights:
a. Provide statement of facts and additional substantial documents;
b. Make a request or give recommendation during the complaint process.

**Article 27 ..**

Disputing parties have the following obligations:
a. Participate in complaint process according to the summon of the Department of Insurance and Pension in good faith, ethic, and conduct;
b. Cooperate fully with the Department of Insurance and Pension during the complaint process;
c. Comply with the contents and conditions as stated in this Prakas.
